zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hullings於1565年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛時，他的父親Henry Hullings24歲，母親Joane Brobarne21歲。他於1588年與Margaret Lawrence在英國格盧斯特斯爾明音哈普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1639年9月28日在英國格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛享年74歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hullings于1565年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛时，他的父亲Henry Hullings24岁，母亲Joane Brobarne21岁。他于1588年与Margaret Lawrence在英国格盧斯特斯爾明音哈普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1639年9月28日在英国格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛享年74岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛。

meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Hullings was born in 1565, in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Hullings, was 24 and his mother, Joane Brobarne, was 21. He married Margaret Lawrence in 1588, in Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 September 1639, in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hullings est né en 1565, à Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Hullings, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joane Brobarne, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Lawrence en 1588, à Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1639, à Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.Springfield, Hampshire, Province of Mass: Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als John Hullings 1565 in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Hullings 24 und seine Mutter Joane Brobarne 21. Er hat 1588 in Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, England Margaret Lawrence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. September 1639 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hullings è nato il nel 1565 nel Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Hullings, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joane Brobarne, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Lawrence nel 1588, nel Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 settembre 1639, nel Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hullingsが1565年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロドボロウで生まれた時，父Henry Hullingsは24歳，母Joane Brobarneは21歳であった。1588年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアミンチンハンプトンでMargaret Lawrenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年9月28日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロドボロウで74歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロドボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Province of Mass: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.lifeSummary: John Hullings(이)가 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 로드버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Hullings(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Brobarne(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1588년 영국 그루스스터실르 민친함프턴에서 Margaret Lawrence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1639년 9월 28일 영국 그루스스터실르 로드버루그h에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 로드버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hullings nasceu em 1565, em Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Hullings, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joane Brobarne, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Lawrence em 1588, em Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1639, em Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Springfield, Hampshire, Province of Mass: спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hullings родился в 1565 г. в местности родбороую, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Hullings было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joane Brobarne, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lawrence в 1588 г. в местности минчинамптон, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 сентября 1639 г. в местности родбороую, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности родбороую, глоусестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Lawrence en 1588, en Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1639, en Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
